voiceCopy.promptTitle: Tap and Speak: Sale, Stock, or Balance

sale.title: Sale Logged
sale.success: Sale confirmed! Your ledger has been updated. Keep selling!
sale.cancelled: Sale cancelled. No changes were saved.

stock.title: Stock Added
stock.template: Added {qty} {item} to your inventory at {currency} {amount}. Confirm?
stock.success: Stock added! Your inventory is now up to date.
stock.cancelled: Stock entry cancelled. Nothing was changed.

payment.title: Payment Started
payment.success: Payment sent! You will get a confirmation on your phone.
payment.cancelled: Payment cancelled. No money was sent.

voiceCopy.dialogTitle: Are you sure you want to log this transaction?
voiceCopy.dialogDescription: Please review the details below before confirming.
